description: Bacteriophage HK022 bacterial attachment site attB; the E. coli chromosomal target in the torS–torT intergenic region for HK022 integrase.

references.title: Specificity determinants in the attachment sites of bacteriophages HK022 and lambda
Conditional-replication, integration, excision, and retrieval plasmid-host systems for gene structure-function studies of bacteria

references.authors: St-Pierre F, Cui L, Priest DG, Endy D, Dodd IB, Shearwin KE
references.title: One-step cloning and chromosomal integration of DNA

label: HK022_attB
note: Phage HK022 bacterial attachment site attB. HK022 (a lambdoid coliphage with altered att specificity vs lambda) integrates in the torS-torT intergenic region — NOT leuX. 44 bp window from NC_000913.3 containing the 7 bp common-core overlap AGGTGAA (the solid, source-verified element); the exact minimal BOB′ boundaries are not pinned to a primary figure and are PROVISIONAL. Cognate phage site: HK022_attP.

provenance.sequence_source: NC_000913.3 (E. coli K-12 MG1655), torS-torT intergenic region, positions 1056169..1056212 (+ strand), 100% identity over 44 bp
